text: find and apply for €50K in German/EU AI grants
description:
Secure ~€50k non-dilutive funding via German/EU AI grant programs. AI NATION (€54k) was not awarded — pivot to ZIM, IBB Pro FIT, KI4KMU, Bayern Digitalbonus, EIC Accelerator.

Research & drafts: meta/german-eu-grants-2026.md

**Blocker:** GmbH/UG incorporation required before any submission.

**Priority order:**
1. ZIM Einzelprojekt (~€50k, rolling)
2. IBB Pro FIT Innovation Berlin (€50–200k)
3. KI4KMU (deadline 15 Oct 2026)
4. Bayern Digitalbonus Plus (€30k, Memmingen)
5. EIC Accelerator Step 1 (EU, rolling)

status.comment: Grant landscape researched; ZIM, KI4KMU, EIC application drafts written. Blocked on GmbH/UG incorporation for actual submission.
